goal: Widen pre-commit staleness hash to include packages/gad-tui/src/**. Today scripts/lib/src-hash.mjs covers only vendor/get-anything-done/{bin,lib,scripts,package.json}. Result: edits to packages/gad-tui/src don't trigger rebuild+install during commits, and the operator has to manually run 'pnpm --filter @magicborn/gad-tui build:bun && cp ...'. Extend computeSrcHash() to ALSO include packages/gad-tui/src/**/*.{ts,tsx} + packages/gad-tui/package.json when running from the monorepo root. Guard: only include these paths if they exist (vendor-only installs without the monorepo skip the TUI part). Make sure the hash is computed over a stable ordering regardless of filesystem order. Verify by editing App.tsx, committing, confirming the pre-commit hook rebuilds both gad.exe AND gad-tui.exe.
